design_philosophy.vibe: Objective, precise, institutional. Feels like a Bloomberg Terminal or Robinhood Pro, replacing the 'cartoonish' purple theme with absolute data clarity.
anti_patterns: No rounded, colorful single-letter crypto circles
No large drop shadows or soft gradients

layout_and_spacing.sidebar: Fixed width w-64, bg-[#0C0C0E], border-r border-[#1F1F22]. High density navigation items.
layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Dense. Use gap-4 for grids, py-2 or py-3 for list items.
layout_and_spacing.border_radius: Sharp. Use rounded-none or max rounded-sm (4px).

surface_strategies.cards: Flat solid backgrounds (bg-[#0C0C0E]), 1px border border-[#1F1F22], no shadow. Grid borders technique.
surface_strategies.modals: Solid flat bg-[#0A0A0C], stark borders, backdrop-blur-md on overlay but strictly dark.
surface_strategies.buttons: Square edges. Primary: bg-white text-black hover:bg-gray-200. Secondary: border border-[#1F1F22] hover:bg-[#161618].

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Subtle background lightening (bg-[#161618]) and text brightening.
motion_and_interactions.live_ticker: react-fast-marquee running continuously at top or bottom with Monospace crypto pairs and green/red pricing.

components.crypto_icons: BANNED: Soft colored circles. REQUIRED: Sharp monochrome squares with exact token logos OR stark 2-letter monospace abbreviations (e.g., [BT] or [ET]) if icons absent.
components.price_alerts_table: Dense data table. Right-aligned numerical columns. Use JetBrains Mono. Badges should be sharp-edged: border border-green-500/30 text-green-400 bg-green-500/10.
components.telegram_connect: Terminal-style CLI block or stark widget. High contrast text.
components.user_profile: Minimalist layout in sidebar bottom. Use exact avatar media URL provided.

icons.style: Regular or Duotone for active states, sharp lines.

user_profile_avatar.description: Professional headshot for the user profile section in the sidebar.

empty_state_texture.description: Dark abstract metal mesh texture. Use with very low opacity (e.g., opacity-10) for empty states or modal backgrounds to break up flat digital black.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure all text meets APCA/WCAG standards against #050505.
accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: All interactive elements, forms, and table rows MUST include data-testid (e.g., data-testid='create-alert-button').

instructions_to_main_agent: Replace all instances of purple/violet with the monochromatic or red/green palette.
Refactor the sidebar to use the #0C0C0E background with strict 1px right border.
Replace 'rounded-full' single letter icons with strict geometric representations or precise SVGs.
Use Shadcn components but override their default rounded corners to `rounded-none` or `rounded-sm`.
Implement the live price ticker using `react-fast-marquee`.
Add the user_profile_avatar image to the profile section.
Avoid standard Vercel styles; ensure heavy use of Mono font for tabular/financial data.
